final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line; excludes minority interest and matches book equity definition.

candidates.why: Also owner-attributable equity and suitable alternate label over time.
